100: 〉 This is a story that takes place 
a few days after [Flynn]'s story ended...
[END]
101: (En no Ozuno) [7a 64429]So, you have awoken... 
I am En no Ozuno.
[->]This is the Diamond Realm. Though, 
you may know it better as the Expanse.
[->]Now then... Do you know why it is 
you have been brought here?
[->]Four others like you have found their
way here.
[->]One of them is under the protection
of a man named Stephen.
[->]The other three are fighting elsewhere.
You must go find them.
[->]Worry about the last one once you
have found the other three.
[->]If you are wounded or need to rest,
my familiars, Zenki and Goki, will
attend to your needs.
[END]
102: (Zenki) [7a 164]If you wish to return to your world,
I will take you there. Simply speak
with me.
[END]
103: (Goki) [7a 165]Come speak with me if you wish to 
heal your wounds. Good luck. 
[END]
104: 〉 Zenki and Goki leave.
[END]
105: (En no Ozuno) [7a 64429]Zenki and Goki are in the adjacent
rooms. Visit them if you are in need
of their services.
[->]Now then, go find the three other
wandering souls...
[END]
200: (Zenki) [7a 164]I am Zenki, an oni who serves 
En no Ozuno... If you so desire, 
I can return you to your world.
[->]Do you wish to return to your world?
[END]
201: Yes
No
[END]
202: (Zenki) [7a 164]Very well. If you pass through here, 
you will return to your world.
[->]Farewell.
[END]
203: (Zenki) [7a 164]I see... If you ever wish to return 
to your world, please speak with me.
[->]Farewell.
[END]
300: (Goki) [7a 165]I am Goki, an oni who serves En no Ozuno.
[->]Would you like me to heal you?
[END]
302: (Goki) [7a 165]Come again if you need additional
healing.
[->]Well, good luck out there.
[END]
303: I see... Let me know if you ever need
healing.
[->]Good luck out there.
[END]
